656955.test_name: [656955] can enter a decimal-based percent discount amount

attempts.hypothesis: applyDiscount.click() triggers cart load_v2 reload that intermittently errors and raises an 'Error loading cart' notification blocking pointer events on the close button
attempts.fix_applied: manual-discount.test.ts: add appliedDiscounts.container.waitFor + clearBlockingNotifications + toPass pattern for close.click(), mirroring sibling tests 654006/654007
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation ✅ · load-realistic run (4-worker parallel, full Manual Discount spec) ✅

654416.test_name: [654416] Single match, auto checkin on, drivers license, checks pass, customer is checked in and guest list page is updated

attempts.hypothesis: simulateScan types keystrokes that trigger checkin/barcode-scan-entry API; ScanPopup overlay remains mounted until response resolves and handleAutoCheckin fires; refresh.click() raced this dismissal
attempts.fix_applied: id-scan.test.ts: wrap simulateScan in Promise.all with waitForResponse('checkin/barcode-scan-entry'); add not.toBeVisible assertions on ScanPopup 'Return to guest list' button and scan-details-popup before refresh.click()
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation ✅ · load-realistic run (4-worker parallel, full id-scan.test.ts — 654416 passed; 5 pre-existing unrelated id-scan flakes not touched by this fix) ✅

attempts.hypothesis: Cherry-picked the 2026-07-21 fix (PR #1609, commits 2b73779d3+9c35d9146): gate refresh.click() on checkin/barcode-scan-entry response + not.toBeVisible(scanDetailsPopup) before proceeding.
attempts.fix_applied: Cherry-picked PR #1609's diff verbatim into id-scan.test.ts for [654416].
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation PASS, but 8-worker load-realistic lane (id-scan.test.ts, full file) FAILED 654416 in 2 of 5 runs, alongside 10+ unrelated id-scan tests failing intermittently in the same runs (654401,654409,654410,654413,654414,654415,654419,654421-654424,654433). This is suite-wide backend contention on shared customer-creation/checkin endpoints under parallel load, not a defect the wait-based fix can address. Reverted the edit; reclassified to infra/backend-slow. Recommend closing PR #1609 rather than merging — its fix does not survive real load either.

657501.test_name: [657501] IGC stacking: apply two Birchmount gift cards to cover the full order amount

attempts.hypothesis: TOCTOU race: after Select_Guest_To_Register Promise.all resolves, app fires load_v2 synchronously; load_v2 could complete before standalone waitForResponse at line 88 attached its listener
attempts.fix_applied: customers-page.ts: merge load_v2 waitForResponse into the same Promise.all as Select_Guest_To_Register so both listeners are registered atomically before the click
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation ✅ · load-realistic run (4-worker parallel, IGC stacking + loyalty + weight tests — 657501 passed) ✅

attempts.hypothesis: customerRow.click() fires the caregiver-checkin-enablement fetch (v2/guest/details-light) fire-and-forget; clicking the Caregiver button before it resolves can leave it disabled indefinitely if the click races ahead of fresh customer data
attempts.fix_applied: caregiver-can-purchase-med.test.ts: added Promise.all(waitForResponse(v2/guest/details-light), customerRow.click()), matching the already-fixed sibling test caregiver-can-purchase-non-med.test.ts
attempts.result: 15/15 isolation pass, 0 failures (load-realistic 8-worker lane not run this session due to time constraints)

654406.test_name: [654406] No match, auto create on, 2D medical id, under recreational age, customer is not created and modal is presented

attempts.hypothesis: Same race class as 654416: scan-details-popup mount races the checkin/barcode-scan-entry response under parallel load. Applied analogous gate.
attempts.fix_applied: Wrapped simulateScan in Promise.all with waitForResponse('checkin/barcode-scan-entry') before asserting scanDetailsPopup visibility.
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation PASS, but reverted alongside 654416 after the load-realistic lane exposed suite-wide id-scan.test.ts backend contention under 8-worker load (see 654416 entry same date). Reclassified to infra/backend-slow.

657074.test_name: [657074] Can return to cart from product history

attempts.hypothesis: Test gated cart-readiness on a bare load_v2 waitForResponse instead of the confirmed Select_Guest_To_Register -> load_v2 signal; load_v2 resolves on the pre-assignment response and does not prove the cart is ready.
attempts.fix_applied: can-return-to-cart-from-history.test.ts: replaced inline showCustomerPreview + Promise.all(load_v2) with customersPage.setup.selectCustomerAndCreateOrder(customerData.id) for both 657073 and 657074.
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation ✅ (both 657073 and 657074) · load-realistic run (8-worker parallel across 7 spec files sharing selectCustomerAndCreateOrder, 3/3, both target tests passed all 3) ✅

cart/loyalty-multipliers/loyalty-multipl.test_name: A loyalty multiplier is automatically applied to the cart and can be manually removed

attempts.hypothesis: AutomaticDiscountConfigsCache is keyed per-LSP and shared across all parallel e2e workers; concurrent discount create/delete expires the shared entry, and the backend's ~1s FusionCache soft-timeout can serve a stale snapshot instead of a fresh one, producing intermittent 0/1/2 multiplier-badge counts. Already traced to source (DiscountRepository.cs) by open draft PR #1619.
attempts.fix_applied: Cherry-picked commit 6038c9bc6 from PR #1619: adds expectLoyaltyEarningCount self-healing retry (page.reload() + toPass) to helpers.ts, applied to loyalty-multiplier.test.ts and loyalty-point-boost.test.ts.
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation ✅ (both loyalty-multiplier and loyalty-point-boost tests) · load-realistic run (8-worker parallel, both spec files sharing helpers.ts, 3/3) ✅
